findings.description: The source introduction explains that `CsrfTokenUtil` is provided to retrieve the generated CSRF token so that projects can implement a mechanism to send the token to REST clients according to their architecture (RESTful web service use case). This is important implementation guidance for REST scenarios — the token must be fetched and forwarded to clients. The knowledge file only mentions `CsrfTokenUtil` in the regeneration section (regenerateCsrfToken), never as a way to GET the current token for REST client delivery.
findings.source_evidence: 生成されたCSRFトークンを取得するためのユーティリティクラス(CsrfTokenUtil)を提供しているので、プロジェクトのアーキテクチャに合わせてクライアントにCSRFトークンを送る仕組みを実装できる。

findings.description: The class `nablarch.common.web.WebConfig` (and its short name `WebConfig`) is referenced in the section content (customizable properties table) but is absent from the hints array. Users asking about WebConfig CSRF properties would not be routed to this section.
